stamp.title: USA 1c Franklin, National Bank Note Co. (1870)
stamp.summary: Large Bank Note issue. National Bank Note Co. printing, characterized by the absence of a secret mark in the lower-left scroll ball. This example shows bright blue color and very strong centering.

stamp.title: USA 1c Franklin, Continental Bank Note Co. (1873)
stamp.summary: Continental Bank Note Co. printing, identified by the 'secret mark'—a small crescent-shaped line within the ball of the scroll at the left of 'ONE'. This specimen is part of a side-by-side comparison for variety identification.
